_comment_redirects: Domain redirects are configured in the Vercel dashboard (Settings → Domains → set IranIntel.com / .org / IranDecrypt.com / .org as 'Redirect to' iranobservatory.org with 308 permanent). This file is reserved for app-level redirects only.

redirects._comment: Legacy SPA routes — keep them landing on the new Next.js equivalents so external backlinks don't 404 during the migration.
